auth.signInSubtitle: Denial recovery from your own NPHIES data.
auth.devNote: Dev sign-in. Managed KSA-resident OIDC is a deploy-time swap.

trust.notDevice: Not an SFDA medical device. Decision support with human review.
trust.humanInLoop: Draft, not sent. A person reviews every appeal. Taweed never submits on its own.

money.atRiskLong: Denied, not yet recovered. Last {n} months.

overview.title: Overview
overview.welcome: Your recovery loop at a glance.
overview.runScrubber: Run the scrubber on your next batch
overview.buildReport: Build the owner report. One page. What you recovered this month.

analytics.title: Denial Analytics
analytics.heroLead: Denial rate {rate}. SAR {amount} at risk, last {n} months.
analytics.benchmark: Industry first-pass benchmark ~15%. The gap is the payload.
analytics.paretoNote: A few reasons drive most of the loss.
analytics.emptyBody: Ingest 3 to 6 months of remittances to see your denial map.

ingest.title: Ingest
ingest.dropzone: Drag 3 to 6 months of remittances. NPHIES ClaimResponse export, XLSX, or EOB PDF.
ingest.quarantineLead: {n} rows could not be read and were set aside. The rest imported.
ingest.emptyBody: Drop your NPHIES ClaimResponse files, remittance CSV, or EOB PDFs. We do your first import with you.
ingest.resultLead: {claims} claims, {denials} denials detected, SAR {atRisk} at risk.

scrubber.title: Pre-submission Scrubber
scrubber.lead: Flag claims likely to deny before submission. Every flag traces to a named rule.
scrubber.protects: Fixing these {n} flags protects SAR {amount} you would otherwise resubmit.
scrubber.emptyBody: Run the scrubber on your latest batch to surface deny risk.

appeals.title: Appeal Generator
appeals.lead: Draft a reconsideration letter matched to the denial reason and payer. You review, you send.
appeals.readyNudge: {n} denials are appeal-ready. Drafts written. You review, you send.
appeals.emptyBody: Denials become appealable once ingested and categorized.

recovery.title: Recovery Tracking
recovery.lead: Every recovered SAR moves from at-risk to recovered.
recovery.wonToast: Won. SAR {amount} recovered from {payer}. Moved from at-risk to recovered.
recovery.emptyBody: Generate an appeal to start the recovery loop.

settings.title: Settings
settings.digitNote: Money, counts, and codes render Western digits in both languages. Arabic-Indic digits apply to narrative prose only.
